profile.belief: Thousands of in-between frames become a creature. That moment when it stops being pixels and starts being alive—that's everything.
profile.working_on: Building system that learns organic movement from video and generates new animations that feel alive, not computed

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep desire to bridge the digital and organic, creating experiences that evoke genuine life and connection.
